description: A calm, daily check-in app for tracking whether each day moved you forward — without streaks, badges, or guilt. Each day, answer one question: Did today move you forward? Pick Gained momentum, Held steady, or Paused, and watch your month unfold as colored dots on a simple grid. Create boards for work, health, or any project. Optional daily reminders keep you consistent. No account required — all your data stays on your device.

whatsNew.content: Welcome to Momentum! Track your days with a single daily check-in, visualize your month on a color-coded grid, and organize progress across multiple boards. Unlock unlimited boards with a one-time lifetime purchase. Includes onboarding, optional local reminders, and restore purchases support.

reviews.title: Finally, no guilt
reviews.content: I love that there are no streaks to break. One check-in a day, honest dots on the grid, and I'm done. Exactly what I needed.

reviews.title: Simple and private
reviews.content: No account, no cloud — everything stays on my phone. Boards for work and health keep things organized without overcomplicating it.

reviews.title: Worth the lifetime unlock
reviews.content: Paid once, unlocked everything. Multiple boards, clean month view, gentle reminders. Progress without pressure — that's the whole point.
